definitions: To decide how to deal with a situation as it develops, rather than planning in advance.
To perform music without sheet music, relying on one's memory or ability to improvise.
examples: We don't have a set plan for the weekend; we'll just play it by ear.
I didn't practice the song, so I'll have to play it by ear during the performance.
Let's see how the meeting goes and play it by ear regarding the next steps.
